items.summary: Reading: match six headings to five short texts about the city Düsseldorf.
Write a reply email about interview clothing; partner speaking task on clothes and shops.
Chapter 12 test: listening true/false and choice, odd-word-out, writing travel questions.
Reading test: choose which of two websites (a or b) holds the needed information.
Write a holiday email; describe and role-play one of three travel pictures.
Audio transcripts for listening chapters 1-3 (greetings, people, Hamburg).
Audio transcripts for chapters 4-5 (food shopping, telling time, family, directions).
Audio transcripts for chapters 6-8 (invitations, office day, doctor messages).
Audio transcripts for chapters 8-10 (doctor, apartments, moving, jobs).
Audio transcripts for chapters 11-12 (shopping talk, station announcements, travel questions).
Scoring guide: points-to-percent scale and Start Deutsch 1 writing/speaking criteria.
Scoring guide: ÖSD Zertifikat A1 writing/speaking criteria, pass marks, grade bands.
